textByHashes.3e9a9a957cceb41d436f611a0bb5cefa0d98b35e: I have the drink you requested, sire.
textByHashes.2b1687e4f317558f2c88ded4eda4e597da8f6caf: Good day to you. The enriched snapdragon is fully grown and ready for you to harvest.
textByHashes.ecc79efcf77719e3f783dfce2c72fe0159b6f4e9: Good day to you. You should take that enriched snapdragon to Thaerisk.
textByHashes.f40e954f8c92b2d69d8da5a88251a72ea5731beb: Not to worry. There was some left over after you were done.
textByHashes.6f81119b43dbfd11e036610a8ec70fcd2bda86c6: Good day to you. I've prepared this patch for you to plant the enriched snapdragon in.
textByHashes.1cffcbb2a16a5735df34e40fe54dc0123c97744a: Good day to you. The enriched snapdragon is growing well. It should be ready soon.
textByHashes.8b68918b69ce785077bd3c130afdf9f58d422092: Good day to you, may nature smile upon you.
